property.name: java.library.path

oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Employee cancels a pending leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee cancels a pending leave request # features/leave-request-service_01_cancel-leave-request_20260321_001400.feature:7 Given the employee logs in with valid credentials # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials() Given the employee has a pending leave request # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeHasAPendingLeaveRequest() When the employee cancels the pending request # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeCancelsThePendingRequest() Then the system responds with "Leave request cancelled successfully." # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theSystemRespondsWithString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: valid credentials (email=admin@test.com) [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: the employee has a pending leave request [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - When: the employee cancels the pending request [main] WARN com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - No HTTP call was made

testcase.name: Employee tries to cancel an already cancelled leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee tries to cancel an already cancelled leave request # features/leave-request-service_01_cancel-leave-request_20260321_001400.feature:12 Given the employee logs in with valid credentials # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials() Given the employee has a cancelled leave request # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeHasACancelledLeaveRequest() When the employee cancels the already cancelled request # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeCancelsTheAlreadyCancelledRequest() Then the system displays the error "This leave request has already been cancelled and cannot be processed." # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: valid credentials (email=admin@test.com) [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: the employee has a cancelled leave request [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - When: the employee cancels the already cancelled request [main] WARN com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - No HTTP call was made

testcase.name: Unauthorized user tries to cancel a leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Unauthorized user tries to cancel a leave request # features/leave-request-service_01_cancel-leave-request_20260321_001400.feature:17 Given the employee logs in with valid credentials # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials() Given the user does not have a valid token # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserDoesNotHaveAValidToken() When the user attempts to cancel a leave request # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserAttemptsToCancelALeaveRequest() Then the system blocks the action # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theSystemBlocksTheAction()
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: valid credentials (email=admin@test.com) [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: the user does not have a valid token [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - When: the user attempts to cancel a leave request [main] WARN com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - No HTTP call was made

testcase.name: Employee tries to cancel a leave request without required fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee tries to cancel a leave request without required fields # features/leave-request-service_01_cancel-leave-request_20260321_001400.feature:22 Given the employee logs in with valid credentials # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeLogsInWithValidCredentials() Given the employee has a pending leave request # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeHasAPendingLeaveRequest() When the employee submits a cancellation request without required fields # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theEmployeeSubmitsACancellationRequestWithoutRequiredFields() Then the system displays the error "This leave request has already been cancelled and cannot be processed." # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: valid credentials (email=admin@test.com) [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Precondition: the employee has a pending leave request [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - When: the employee submits a cancellation request without required fields [main] WARN com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - No HTTP call was made
